equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: Earliest/RaceEmptyPayload fallback exists, but the audited port has no empty_payload_grace setting and spawns the empty payload immediately.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Earliest empty-payload fallback does not wait a configured grace duration before building an empty payload.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/payload/basic/src/lib.rs spawns build_empty_payload immediately in the RaceEmptyPayload branch.
crates/node/core/src/args/payload_builder.rs exposes interval, deadline, max tasks, blobs, and max block size, but no empty_payload_grace.
Search found no empty_payload_grace or builder.empty-payload-grace symbol in the audited port.

notes: The current fallback behavior is immediate once RaceEmptyPayload is selected.
rationale: The diff adds empty_payload_grace to CLI/config/generator state with a 200ms default and sleeps for that grace period before invoking build_empty_payload in the RaceEmptyPayload path. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When the payload builder races an empty payload fallback for an Earliest-style missing-payload resolution, the fallback waits the configured empty_payload_grace duration before building the empty payload.
suggested_falsification_tests: Configure empty_payload_grace to 200ms, trigger MissingPayloadBehaviour::RaceEmptyPayload for an Earliest request, and assert build_empty_payload is not called before the grace elapses; set grace to zero and assert it starts immediately.
summary: Earliest empty-payload fallback has no grace wait.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Trigger RaceEmptyPayload with no best payload and assert build_empty_payload can start immediately; there is no grace timer to configure or observe.
title: Earliest fallback waits before empty payload
